---
title: "phyloP and SpliceAI Analysis v3"
author: "Analysis"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output:
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_float: true
    code_folding: show
    fig.width: 12
    fig.height: 8
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE, fig.width = 12, fig.height = 8)
```

```{r load-libraries}
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(data.table)
library(stringr)
library(ggrepel)
```

## Load Data

```{r load-data}
# Set base path relative to this scripts directory
base_path <- normalizePath("..", winslash = "/", mustWork = TRUE)

# Load SpliceAI v3.1 data
spliceai_data <- fread(file.path(base_path, "results", "all_spliceai_scores_v3.1.tsv"),
  sep = "\t",
  header = TRUE
)

cat("\nLoaded SpliceAI v3.1 data:\n")
cat("  Total rows:", nrow(spliceai_data), "\n")
cat("  Total columns:", ncol(spliceai_data), "\n")
```

## Parse SpliceAI Data

```{r parse-spliceai}
# Function to parse SpliceAI v3.1 format: [max1][pos1][max2][pos2][d]
# Extract max1 (canonical splice score)
parse_spliceai_max1 <- function(value) {
  if (is.na(value) || value == "" || value == "[-1.0][-1][-1.0][-1][-1.0]") {
    return(NA)
  }
  match_result <- str_match(value, "\\[([\\d.-]+)\\]\\[(\\d+)\\]\\[([\\d.-]+)\\]\\[(\\d+)\\]\\[([\\d.-]+)\\]")
  if (is.na(match_result[1])) {
    return(NA)
  }
  max1 <- as.numeric(match_result[2])
  if (is.na(max1) || max1 == -1.0) {
    return(NA)
  }
  return(max1)
}

# Function to parse SpliceAI v3.1 format: [max1][pos1][max2][pos2][d]
# Extract max2 (decoy splice score)
parse_spliceai_max2 <- function(value) {
  if (is.na(value) || value == "" || value == "[-1.0][-1][-1.0][-1][-1.0]") {
    return(NA)
  }
  match_result <- str_match(value, "\\[([\\d.-]+)\\]\\[(\\d+)\\]\\[([\\d.-]+)\\]\\[(\\d+)\\]\\[([\\d.-]+)\\]")
  if (is.na(match_result[1])) {
    return(NA)
  }
  max2 <- as.numeric(match_result[4])
  if (is.na(max2) || max2 == -1.0) {
    return(NA)
  }
  return(max2)
}

# Function to parse SpliceAI v3.1 format: [max1][pos1][max2][pos2][d]
# Extract pos2 (position of max2)
parse_spliceai_pos2 <- function(value) {
  if (is.na(value) || value == "" || value == "[-1.0][-1][-1.0][-1][-1.0]") {
    return(NA)
  }
  match_result <- str_match(value, "\\[([\\d.-]+)\\]\\[(\\d+)\\]\\[([\\d.-]+)\\]\\[(\\d+)\\]\\[([\\d.-]+)\\]")
  if (is.na(match_result[1])) {
    return(NA)
  }
  pos2 <- as.integer(match_result[5])
  if (is.na(pos2) || pos2 == -1) {
    return(NA)
  }
  return(pos2)
}

# Get species columns (all except decoyID)
species_cols <- setdiff(colnames(spliceai_data), "decoyID")

# Parse all data into long format
parsed_data_list <- list()

for (species in species_cols) {
  # Extract max1, max2, and pos2 for each species
  max1_values <- sapply(spliceai_data[[species]], parse_spliceai_max1)
  max2_values <- sapply(spliceai_data[[species]], parse_spliceai_max2)
  pos2_values <- sapply(spliceai_data[[species]], parse_spliceai_pos2)

  # Create data frame for this species
  species_data <- data.frame(
    decoyID = spliceai_data$decoyID,
    species = species,
    max1 = max1_values,
    max2 = max2_values,
    pos2 = pos2_values,
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )

  parsed_data_list[[species]] <- species_data
}

# Combine all species data
all_spliceai_parsed <- bind_rows(parsed_data_list)

# Filter out NA values
all_spliceai_parsed <- all_spliceai_parsed %>%
  filter(!is.na(max1) | !is.na(max2))

cat("\nParsed SpliceAI data:\n")
cat("  Total data points:", nrow(all_spliceai_parsed), "\n")
cat("  Data points with max1:", sum(!is.na(all_spliceai_parsed$max1)), "\n")
cat("  Data points with max2:", sum(!is.na(all_spliceai_parsed$max2)), "\n")
cat("  Data points with pos2:", sum(!is.na(all_spliceai_parsed$pos2)), "\n")
```

# Decoy HNRNPH1 max2 vs pos2 scatter plot

```{r scatter-plot-hnrnph1-max2-pos2}
# Load species mapping to get common names
species_mapping <- fread(file.path(base_path, "data", "tree_to_clade_mapping.tsv"),
  sep = "\t",
  header = TRUE
)

# Create lookup: species_id -> matched_common_name
species_id_to_common <- setNames(species_mapping$matched_common_name, species_mapping$species_id)
# Create lookup: species_id -> clade
species_id_to_clade <- setNames(species_mapping$clade, species_mapping$species_id)

# Extract all parsed rows for HNRNPH1_179620582 and annotate species metadata
hnrnph1_all <- all_spliceai_parsed %>%
  filter(decoyID == "HNRNPH1_179620582") %>%
  mutate(
    common_name = ifelse(species %in% names(species_id_to_common),
      species_id_to_common[species],
      species
    ),
    clade = ifelse(species %in% names(species_id_to_clade),
      species_id_to_clade[species],
      "Unknown"
    )
  )

# Save all parsed rows for this decoy as TSV
fwrite(
  hnrnph1_all,
  file = file.path(base_path, "data", "Decoys", "hnrnph1_spliceaispecies.tsv"),
  sep = "\t"
)

# Subsets for positional scatterplots
hnrnph1_data_max2 <- hnrnph1_all %>% filter(!is.na(max2) & !is.na(pos2))

cat("\nHNRNPH1_179620582 data:\n")
cat("  Total parsed rows saved:", nrow(hnrnph1_all), "\n")
cat("  Species with max2 and pos2:", nrow(hnrnph1_data_max2), "\n")
cat("  Output TSV: ", file.path(base_path, "data", "Decoys", "hnrnph1_spliceaispecies.tsv"), "\n", sep = "")

if (nrow(hnrnph1_data_max2) > 0) {
  # Create scatter plot with color by clade
  p_hnrnph1_max2_pos2 <- ggplot(hnrnph1_data_max2, aes(x = pos2, y = max2, color = clade)) +
    geom_point(alpha = 0.7, size = 2) +
    # Add floating labels with common names
    geom_text_repel(aes(label = common_name),
      size = 3.5,
      min.segment.length = 0,
      segment.size = 0.3,
      segment.color = "gray50",
      box.padding = 0.5,
      point.padding = 0.3,
      max.overlaps = Inf,
      show.legend = FALSE
    ) +
    scale_color_brewer(palette = "Dark2", name = "Clade") +
    labs(
      title = "HNRNPH1_179620582 Cryptic Element Conservation Shows Positional Shift",
      subtitle = "SpliceAI donor scores calculated across whole intron multiple alignment file for maximum position as proposed regulatory element",
      x = "Loci distance from canonical 5' splice site (nt)",
      y = "Consensus Sequence Strength (SpliceAI Donor Score)"
    ) +
    theme_minimal() +
    theme(
      plot.title = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold"),
      plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 12),
      legend.position = "right",
      axis.line.x = element_line(colour = "black", linewidth = 0.5),
      axis.line.y = element_line(colour = "black", linewidth = 0.5)
    )

  print(p_hnrnph1_max2_pos2)
  pdf(file.path(base_path, "results", "hnrnph1_max2_pos2_scatterplot.pdf"), width = 14, height = 10)
  print(p_hnrnph1_max2_pos2)
  dev.off()
  cat("  Output PDF: ", file.path(base_path, "results", "hnrnph1_max2_pos2_scatterplot.pdf"), "\n", sep = "")

  # Print summary statistics
  cat("\nSummary statistics (max2 plot):\n")
  cat("  Mean max2:", round(mean(hnrnph1_data_max2$max2, na.rm = TRUE), 4), "\n")
  cat("  Median max2:", round(median(hnrnph1_data_max2$max2, na.rm = TRUE), 4), "\n")
  cat("  Min max2:", round(min(hnrnph1_data_max2$max2, na.rm = TRUE), 4), "\n")
  cat("  Max max2:", round(max(hnrnph1_data_max2$max2, na.rm = TRUE), 4), "\n")
  cat("  Mean pos2:", round(mean(hnrnph1_data_max2$pos2, na.rm = TRUE), 2), "\n")
  cat("  Median pos2:", round(median(hnrnph1_data_max2$pos2, na.rm = TRUE), 2), "\n")
  cat("  Min pos2:", min(hnrnph1_data_max2$pos2, na.rm = TRUE), "\n")
  cat("  Max pos2:", max(hnrnph1_data_max2$pos2, na.rm = TRUE), "\n")
} else {
  cat("  No data found for HNRNPH1_179620582 with both max2 and pos2\n")
}
```
